offerings.name: Boarding School for Puppies
offerings._mergeNote: SINGLE SOURCE FOR THE RESIDENTIAL PUPPY COURSE (owner, 2026-07-21). This absorbed the former `puppy-intensive` ("Comprehensive Puppy Training", public name "Puppy School") — the two were byte-identical on price, unit and eligibility once the owner corrected them, and he confirmed they are ONE product. Board & Train is the residential RANGE (older dogs and puppies, varying lengths and entry criteria); this is its puppy course. It is rendered on BOTH /dog-boarding-school (as part of the range) and /comprehensive-puppy-training (the dedicated page, public name "Puppy School"). ⚠️ /dog-boarding-school is under a drop-recovery freeze — name/price/unit/eligibility/features render there, so DO NOT change those fields until the freeze lifts. Adding non-rendered keys (like the two below) is safe. See SEO.md locked #11/#12/#13.
offerings._arrangementsNote: THE PUPPY BOARDING RULE — owner's own words, 2026-07-21 (SEO.md locked decision #13). This fact has been owner-confirmed in FOUR shapes (2026-06-30 day-only+local-only · 2026-07-18 both-board reversal · 2026-07-21 local/non-local rule · 2026-07-21 eligibility+unit). It lives HERE, in data, because every previous version lived only in page prose and each session re-derived it and got it wrong. RENDER FROM THIS BLOCK — never restate the rule in copy, and never mix the two groups' requirements in one passage. NOT rendered on the frozen /dog-boarding-school (that page reads name/price/unit/eligibility/features only), so adding it is freeze-safe.

local.label: Local to Hastings
local.summary: Boarding is available but optional — the arrangement stays flexible.
options: With us during the week, home at weekends
Boarding with us for the full four weeks

nonLocal.label: Travelling to us from London and beyond
nonLocal.summary: Puppies travelling to us board with us for the four-week course.
options: Home at weekends, if you would prefer that
With us right through until the course ends

offerings.name: Boarding School for Dogs
offerings.eligibility: Adult dogs 16 weeks and over; rescue dogs assessed case-by-case

offerings.name: One to One Dog Training
features: Private sessions at your dog's pace

offerings.name: Free Phone Consultation
features: Helps you pick the right training programme

offerings.name: Confidence Building Session (CBS)
features: Lead pulling, focus, recall, obedience, town walks

offerings.name: Membership Half Days
offerings.eligibility: Available to registered school dogs who have been through the introduction process and are accepted into the school.
features: Hot towel wash after muddy days
Monthly bath and brush with a maintenance trim included

offerings.name: Membership Full Days — Tier 1
offerings.eligibility: Available to registered school dogs who have been through the introduction process and are accepted into the school.
features: Monthly bath and brush with a maintenance trim included

offerings.name: Membership Full Days — Tier 2
